## About 777 Hire

777 Hire Delivers Reliable B2B Plant, Power & Infrastructure Hire Solutions For Construction, Utilities, Events & Industry.

777 Hire delivers dependable B2B plant, power, and site infrastructure hire, supporting construction, utilities, events, and industrial projects with experienced coordination, trusted suppliers, and nationwide coverage.

## Built For Business

Purpose led hire solutions supporting complex projects across multiple sectors.

## Delivered with Confidence

Experienced coordination ensuring reliable supply, compliance, and on time delivery
